title: UPESSC Assistant Professor BEd Online Form 2025
post_name: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC UPHESC Assistant Professor BEd Recruitment 2025, Apply Online for 107 Post
organization_full_name: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC
fee_payment_method: Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay the Exam Fee Through Offline Mode Only.
age_relaxation_notes: Age Relaxation Extra as per UPHESC Assistant Professor Recruitment Rules.
how_to_apply: Note : Applicants who have already applied under the B.Ed subject do not need to apply again. Their previous registration will remain valid.

Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC, Uttar Pradesh Higher Education Service Commission UPHESC 51 Are Issued Assistant Professor BEd Subject Recruitment 2025 – Advt No. 51. Candidate Can Apply Between 23/05/2025 to 12/06/2025.
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in UPESSC Advt No. 51 Assistant Professor BEd Subject Recruitment 2025.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
